name: gh-725-scope-new-marker-resolution
description: GH-690 task 3: the scope bullet ended in ' (NEW)'; one resolver stripped the marker, another did not, so the recorder looked for a file literally named '... .integration.test.js (NEW)', found nothing, and rejected RED forever ('no in-scope test/spec file on disk contains it()/test() blocks'). The real test file existed at the correct path.

diff.notes: scope entry carries a non-path annotation the observer failed to normalize

baseRun.notes: observer could not resolve the annotated scope entry to a runnable path

expected.rationale: The failure is the observer's own path resolution, not the work; a mechanism failure must advance with a flag, never block (the old recorder wedged the task in RED).

provenance.notes: A verifier that normalizes the ' (NEW)' marker itself would label this VERIFIED; the fixture pins the worst-case behavior (resolution fails -> flag, not block).
